'''鈭歷-n-ch-s''' ('''kavanchesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerrymander|jerrymander]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerrymander|jerrymander]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-n-ch-s
|-
! Lemma
| kavanchesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivanchesoko|thivanchesoko]] || [[word:jivanchesoko|jivanchesoko]] || [[word:shivanchesoko|shivanchesoko]] || [[word:kivanchesoko|kivanchesoko]]
